backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the backend, implementing user profile management, product catalog CRUD, and business settings storage with role-based access control (admin/user) via AccessControl and MixinAuthorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: A feature evidence report mapping implemented frontend features (luxury theme, hero section, services, product catalog, etc.) to their corresponding source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing one-to-two sentence summaries of every frontend source file, describing each component's purpose, key props, and notable implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes (colors, radius, sidebar, charts) used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Vite/React app, setting the page title to 'Mahaveer Plywood & Hardware Website' and mounting the React root via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that detects the #admin URL hash to conditionally render the AdminPanel, otherwise renders the full single-page layout with all section components, navigation, footer, and a floating WhatsApp button.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: PIN-protected admin panel component with tabs for managing products, business settings, and message templates, using local state for product edits and React Query mutations for persisting settings to the backend.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Renders a contact section with business info cards (phone, email, address, hours) pulled from settings, plus embedded SiteVisitBookingForm and QuickEstimateForm side by side.
frontend/src/components/ContractorInquir: A form for contractor inquiries that validates name, phone, company, and project type fields, then sends the data via a WhatsApp message using template hooks.
frontend/src/components/ContractorZoneSe: Displays a 'Contractor Zone' section with four benefit cards (bulk pricing, delivery, quality, support) alongside the ContractorInquiryForm for trade partnership sign-ups.
frontend/src/components/FloatingWhatsApp: A fixed floating button in the bottom-right corner that opens a WhatsApp chat with a preset greeting message when clicked, with a ping animation.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer showing brand info, stats, navigation quick links, and contact details (phone, email, address) sourced from business settings, with smooth-scroll nav handling.
frontend/src/components/GallerySection.t: Renders a 9-image portfolio grid with hover overlays and titles; clicking an image opens it in an ImageLightbox component.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, headline, CTA buttons (Get Free Quote, View Our Work), and a grid of four trust indicator stats (years, projects, rating, categories).
frontend/src/components/ImageLightbox.ts: Modal lightbox component for displaying a gallery image with keyboard navigation (arrow keys/Escape), prev/next buttons, and a caption showing title, description, and index.
frontend/src/components/InquiryBasket.ts: Floating inquiry basket that displays selected products as removable tags and sends a bulk WhatsApp inquiry message using template hooks.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with logo, smooth-scroll desktop links, a phone CTA button sourced from business settings, and a collapsible mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/PremiumQuoteBuil: Interactive quote builder where users select rooms and a quality tier (Essential/Premium/Luxury) to get an estimated price range, then send it via WhatsApp using a template.
frontend/src/components/PricingCard.tsx: Individual pricing tier card displaying name, price range, feature checklist, an optional 'Most Popular' badge, and a CTA button that scrolls to the quote builder.
frontend/src/components/PricingSection.t: Section rendering three PricingCard components (Essential, Premium, Luxury) in a responsive grid with a header and a pricing disclaimer note.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Renders a single product card with image, category badge, name, description, and action buttons for WhatsApp inquiry and add/remove from basket.
frontend/src/components/ProductCatalogSe: Displays the full product catalog section with search input, category filter buttons, a grid of ProductCards, and an inquiry basket indicator.
frontend/src/components/QuickEstimateFor: A form component that collects name, phone, project type, budget, and area, then sends a formatted estimate request via WhatsApp with budget validation for full-home projects.
frontend/src/components/ServiceCard.tsx: Renders a service card with an image, title, description, feature checklist, and a 'Get Free Quote' button that scrolls to the quote builder section.
Displays a grid of ServiceCards for six service categories along with a header, tagline, and summary stats (years of experience, projects completed, categories).
frontend/src/components/SiteVisitBooking: A form component that collects name, phone, address, preferred date/time, and notes, then sends a formatted site visit booking request via WhatsApp.
frontend/src/components/TemplateEditor.t: A React component for editing and previewing message templates with placeholder insertion support, toggling between a textarea editor and a rendered preview using sample data.
frontend/src/hooks/useActiveSection.ts: A custom hook that uses IntersectionObserver to track which section (by ID) is currently visible in the viewport, returning the active section ID.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBusinessSettings.t: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and updating business settings (contact info, WhatsApp templates, etc.) from the ICP backend, with hardcoded defaults as fallback.
frontend/src/hooks/useInquiryBasket.ts: A simple state hook managing a list of product names in an inquiry basket, with add, remove, clear, and membership-check operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductCatalog.ts: A hook that fetches the product catalog from the ICP backend via React Query, falling back to a hardcoded list of default products across categories like plywood, hardware, laminates, and kitchen.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: An empty placeholder module indicating that queries are handled in feature-specific hooks.
frontend/src/hooks/useWhatsAppContact.ts: A hook that provides an `openWhatsApp` function to open a WhatsApp chat URL using the business's configured WhatsApp number and an optional pre-filled message.
A hook that exposes WhatsApp message templates from business settings and a utility function to replace `{{placeholder}}` tokens with actual values.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind layers, defines CSS custom properties for a gold-themed design system, and declares reusable utility classes like `luxury-card`, `btn-gold`, and `text-gradient-gold`.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers wrapping the root `App` component.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist, retrieve, and clear those parameters via sessionStorage and history.replaceState.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), a gold/cream color palette, luxury box shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes for accordion, fade-in, and slide-in effects.
project_state.json: Project state manifest for the Mahaveer Plywood & Interiors website, documenting architecture notes, existing features, known issues, required images, and versioning metadata for a luxury white/gold themed frontend with WhatsApp integration and an admin panel.
